revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿五]][[zh:八月廿五]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 25|qq=August 25}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|qid=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}} 7th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1498|en|1498|qid=Q6705|lt=1498 AD|1=1498}} {{ill|September 11|en|September 11|qid=Q2851|lt=September 11|1=September 11}} ) – A great earthquake struck the entire {{ill|Tōkai region|en|Tōkai region|qid=Q398989|lt=Tokai region|1=Tōkai region}} , and a {{ill|Tsunami|en|Tsunami|qid=Q8070|lt=tsunami|1=Tsunami}} connected {{ill|Lake Hamana|en|Lake Hamana|qid=Q1150952|lt=Lake Hamana|1=Lake Hamana}} to the open sea. * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 12th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1543|en|1543|qid=Q6523|lt=1543 AD|1=1543}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}} ) – A Portuguese ship drifted ashore at {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|qid=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima|1=Tanegashima}} , introducing {{ill|Tanegashima (gun)|en|Tanegashima (gun)|qid=Q358057|lt=firearms|1=Tanegashima (gun)}} to Japan (various theories propose dates such as 1542 or 1545, and some claim that firearms existed in Japan prior to Tanegashima). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1598|en|1598|qid=Q6800|lt=1598 AD|1=1598}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}} ) – Following the death of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} and the Five Elders decided to withdraw from {{ill|Korea|en|Korea|qid=Q18097|lt=Korea|1=Korea}} and dispatched envoys. * {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|qid=Q1145295|lt=Manji|1=Manji (era)}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1660|en|1660|qid=Q7001|lt=1660 AD|1=1660}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|qid=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|qid=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna|1=Tokugawa Ietsuna}} deposed {{ill|Date Tsunamune|en|Date Tsunamune|qid=Q846370|lt=Date Tsunamune|1=Date Tsunamune}} , the lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|qid=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} , and executed the succession of 2-year-old Kamechiyo ({{ill|Date Tsunamura|en|Date Tsunamura|qid=Q5227557|lt=Date Tsunamura|1=Date Tsunamura}} ), sparking the Date Incident. * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 7th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1757|en|1757|qid=Q7635|lt=1757 AD|1=1757}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|qid=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Karai Senryū|en|Karai Senryū|qid=Q536561|lt=Karai Senryū|1=Karai Senryū}} , under the name “Mumeian Senryū,” held the first Senryū poetry contest. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 7th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836 AD|1=1836}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|qid=Q2930|lt=October 5|1=October 5}} ) – {{ill|Enomoto Takeaki|en|Enomoto Takeaki|qid=Q532959|lt=Enomoto Takeaki|1=Enomoto Takeaki}} , a retainer and diplomat (d. {{ill|1908|en|1908|qid=Q2056|lt=1908 AD|1=1908}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Enkei|ja|延慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkei|1=Enkei (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306063}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1308|en|1308|qid=Q5723|lt=1308 AD|1=1308}} {{ill|September 10|en|September 10|qid=Q2853|lt=September 10|1=September 10}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Nijō|en|Emperor Go-Nijō|qid=Q374075|lt=Emperor Go-Nijō|1=Emperor Go-Nijō}} , the 94th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1285|en|1285|qid=Q5546|lt=1285 AD|1=1285}} ). * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} 6th Year / {{ill|Bunchū|en|Bunchū|qid=Q1194181|lt=Bunchū|1=Bunchū}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1373|en|1373|qid=Q6261|lt=1373 AD|1=1373}} {{ill|September 12|en|September 12|qid=Q2849|lt=September 12|1=September 12}} ) – {{ill|Sasaki Takauji|en|Sasaki Takauji|qid=Q1036907|lt=Sasaki Michitane|1=Sasaki Takauji}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1296|en|1296|qid=Q5561|lt=1296 AD|1=1296}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 18th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1613|en|1613|qid=Q6776|lt=1613 AD|1=1613}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|qid=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Asano Yoshinaga|en|Asano Yoshinaga|qid=Q1143577|lt=Asano Yukinaga|1=Asano Yoshinaga}} , the lord of the {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|qid=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain|1=Kishū Domain}} (born {{ill|1576|en|1576|qid=Q6700|lt=1576 AD|1=1576}} ). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1648|en|1648|qid=Q6941|lt=1648 AD|1=1648}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|qid=Q2927|lt=October 11|1=October 11}} ) – {{ill|Nakae Tōju|en|Nakae Tōju|qid=Q1065728|lt=Nakae Toju|1=Nakae Tōju}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1608|en|1608|qid=Q6758|lt=1608 AD|1=1608}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|qid=Q7760|lt=1786 AD|1=1786}} {{ill|September 17|en|September 17|qid=Q2894|lt=September 17|1=September 17}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|qid=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieji|1=Tokugawa Ieharu}} , the 10th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born {{ill|1737|en|1737|qid=Q6993|lt=1737 AD|1=1737}} ). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Senryū Origin Day|ja|川柳発祥の日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senryū Origin Day|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} : On August 25 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 7th Year, {{ill|Karai Senryū|en|Karai Senryū|qid=Q536561|lt=Karai Senryū|1=Karai Senryū}} initiated the first Senryū poetry contest, marking the origin of Senryū literature.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|24|8|26|7|25|9|8|0825|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:8 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:August 25 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 8월 25일]] [[ja:8月25日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿五]]
[[ja:年表]]
[[ar:August 25 (Lunisolar)]]
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月廿五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月廿五]] {{wikidata link|Q840095}} [[Category:Days]] [[Category:旧暦8月]]
